description: DiffLore lifecycle hooks — inject team rules into Claude Code as it writes code

hooks.command: export PATH="$HOME/.cargo/bin:$HOME/.local/bin:/usr/local/bin:/opt/homebrew/bin:$PATH"; command -v difflore-hook >/dev/null 2>&1 && difflore-hook --client claude-code || true

export PATH="$HOME/.cargo/bin:$HOME/.local/bin:/usr/local/bin:/opt/homebrew/bin:$PATH"; command -v difflore-hook >/dev/null 2>&1 && difflore-hook --client claude-code || true
export PATH="$HOME/.cargo/bin:$HOME/.local/bin:/usr/local/bin:/opt/homebrew/bin:$PATH"; command -v difflore-hook >/dev/null 2>&1 && difflore-hook --client claude-code || true
